name: indian_visa
title: Indian eVisa Form Walkthrough
description: Fill the Indian eVisa application start form with safe dummy data and stop before captcha submission.
prompt: Open indianvisaonline.gov.in eVisa form, enter fake applicant details, and stop safely at captcha.
narration_script_text:
Welcome, traveler. Open the Indian eVisa portal. All those colors feel like a bureaucratic rangoli. The quest begins now.

Hit Apply like it's a win-a-million-dollars link. Boom, the form appears, blue, white, and ready for your life story.

Tell them who you are. United States. Ordinary Passport. Diplomatic passport holders can skip this tutorial.

Choose your Port of Arrival. Today we're catching sea breeze at Agatti Seaport. Fancy. And now the portal enters its meditation break.

And now we wait. This blank screen is digital dharma. Check your sunscreen, respect the spice, maybe hydrate. Government loading bars move only after enlightenment.

Still nothing? Not a glitch. A spiritual test. Namaste, loading screen, please have mercy on us. Stay with me.

We're back. Add the birth date and your email. Use one you actually check, not batman123 at gmail.

Choose the service: 30-Day e-Tourist Visa. The taster menu of visas. Tourism, recreation, all the hits.

Set the arrival date and tick the instructions box. We are almost at the good part.

Final boss: captcha. We stop here for safety, but India is right around the corner.
